program_name: Molecular Biology, Medicinal Chemistry and Computer Science for Pharmaceutical Applications
faculty: Faculty of Pharmacy and Medicine (Department of Drug Chemistry and Technologies)
admission_test_type: English TOLC-F (CISIA, also TOLC@CASA/TOLC@HOME mode) or SAT General Test (College Board)
applicant_route: non-EU residing in Italy with valid residence permit (EU-equivalent)
non-EU residing abroad (visa-required, MoveIN pre-selection route)
application_platform: Infostud (Sapienza), CISIA/College Board (test), QS MoveIN (non-EU pre-selection), Universitaly (visa pre-enrolment)
access_quota_non_eu: 30 places reserved for non-EU candidates residing abroad (per 2025-2026 data). [uncertain]
places_and_foreign_contingent: 20 places reserved for EU candidates and 30 places reserved for non-EU candidates residing abroad (per 2025-2026 data); admission also requires passing English TOLC-F or SAT with a converted score above zero. [uncertain]
academic_requirements: Upper secondary school diploma (5-year/13-year schooling as applicable). Restricted-access programme: candidates must pass the English TOLC-F (or SAT) achieving a total converted score above zero, plus meet the B2 English requirement. Candidates with non-Italian qualifications follow Sapienza international-enrolment document rules.
country_specific_eligibility: Country-specific qualification, minimum schooling years and document/validation requirements are governed by the MoveIN academic requirements PDF for non-EU applicants (academic_requirements_sapienza_2026_2027). [uncertain]
curricular_integration_policy: Further Required Courses (OFAs) may be assigned to candidates not reaching the test threshold, per Sapienza restricted-access rules. [uncertain]
conditional_enrolment_policy: Applicants may hold a diploma obtained or to be obtained in the application year; non-EU visa applicants must complete Universitaly pre-enrolment by the stated deadline. [uncertain]
language_requirements: English proficiency of at least B2 (CEFR) is required for admission to this entirely English-taught programme. Accepted certificates typically include IELTS, TOEFL iBT, Cambridge English B2, and Trinity ISE, with native-speaker / English-medium-instruction exemptions, per Sapienza English-programme standards. Exact minimum scores not confirmed on a programme-specific 2026-2027 source. [uncertain]
language_submission_timing: English B2 proficiency must be met for admission/enrolment; submitted as part of the admission/MoveIN/enrolment procedure. [uncertain]
italian_language_requirement: Not required for this English-taught programme; Italian language test applies only to non-EU applicants choosing Italian-language curricula. Recommended for daily life. [uncertain]
application_deadline_eu: For 2026-2027, EU and EU-equivalent candidates can apply until 31 July 2026 (central international admissions deadline); programme test/enrolment dates follow the faculty call. [uncertain]
application_deadline_non_eu: For 2026-2027, non-EU visa applicants must complete MoveIN pre-selection by 15 May 2026 (central deadline). [uncertain]
application_fee: €30 MoveIN pre-selection fee per application (non-EU route), plus a separate €10 Infostud fee to record the test result and enrol.
visa_preenrolment_deadline: Universitaly pre-enrolment for the study visa, per the central 2026-2027 admissions calendar. [uncertain]
academic_year: 2026-2027 (central rules); places and test type confirmed from 2025-2026 data [uncertain]
required_documents: For non-Italian qualifications: Declaration of Value (DoV) or CIMEA statement, legalized/apostilled and translated diploma and transcript (per Sapienza international-enrolment rules)
English language certificate or proof of exemption (B2)
English TOLC-F or SAT score report
For non-EU visa applicants: MoveIN pre-acceptance letter and Universitaly pre-enrolment
document_translation_authentication: Foreign secondary qualifications generally require legalization/apostille, official translation into Italian, and a Declaration of Value (DoV) or CIMEA statement of comparability per Sapienza international-enrolment rules. [uncertain]
entry_exam_or_test: English TOLC-F (CISIA online, also TOLC@CASA/TOLC@HOME) OR SAT General Test (College Board). Restricted-access selection.
test_variant_and_session: English TOLC-F per CISIA schedule; SAT at any centre worldwide. Exact 2026-2027 session windows depend on the programme's call. [uncertain]
test_score_conversion_or_threshold: A total converted score above zero is required to pass the English TOLC-F or SAT; below-threshold candidates may receive Further Required Courses (OFAs). [uncertain]

source_quotes.quote: The degree course in Molecular Biology, Medicinal Chemistry and Computer Science for Pharmaceutical Applications is a three-year degree program of the L-29 Pharmaceutical Sciences and Technologies class entirely taught in English.

To enroll... you must take CEnT-S. It is a restricted-admission degree course. Candidates must successfully pass the English TOLC-F assessments (including the TOLC@CASA mode) or the SAT, achieving a total converted score exceeding zero.
20 places reserved to EU candidates and 30 places reserved for non-EU candidates residing abroad... for the L-29 Class at Latina Campus.

The deadline for visa seeking candidates applying to programs on the MoveIN pre-selection platform is May 15, 2026, and all other candidates will be able to submit a pre-selection application until July 31, 2026.

uncertainty_notes: Programme name in the task ('Pharmaceutical Applications (Biomolecular, Pharmaceutical & IT Research)') is a paraphrase; the official catalogue name is 'Molecular Biology, Medicinal Chemistry and Computer Science for Pharmaceutical Applications' (course code 33457, L-29).

Programme-specific 2026-2027 Call PDF was not retrievable at the standard documenti_ufficiali path; admission mechanics (English TOLC-F/SAT, restricted access) and places (20 EU / 30 non-EU) reflect 2025-2026 data and may change for 2026-2027.
Faculty is the Faculty of Pharmacy and Medicine; the task listed 'Pharmacy and Medicine' which matches. Department: Drug Chemistry and Technologies (DCTF).
Exact accepted English certificate scores, document authentication, intake, deadlines and OFA policy inferred from general Sapienza/MoveIN rules, not a programme-specific 2026-2027 source.
Non-EU deadline 15 May 2026 / EU deadline 31 July 2026 are central international-admissions dates; this restricted-access programme also has its own test/enrolment deadlines via the faculty call.
